v5.0 — OpenClaw Constitution

OpenClaw
AGI CLI for Solo Founders

Run your entire company from the terminal.
16+ packages. 1 person. 0 employees.

npm install -g @openclaw/mekong-cli content_copy Copy
bolt Quickstart menu_book Read Guides

Everything you need to run a company

From idea to exit — without hiring a single employee.

🏢
Core

SoloOS

8-department AI company. Sales, Marketing, Finance, HR, Product, Engineering, Ops, and Legal — all autonomous.

💳
Monetize

RaaS

License + credit metering out of the box. Monetize any CLI or API with Polar.sh webhooks and MCU billing.

🤖
AI

Multi-CLI

CC CLI + Gemini + Qwen + any OpenAI-compatible provider. Automatic failover and swarm routing.

🧬
Advanced

AGI Evolution

Self-improving codebase. The engine audits itself, proposes refactors, and ships improvements autonomously.

📈
Founder

VC Ready

Pitch deck generation, cap table management, data room, compliance reports, and exit strategy planning.

🔑
SDK

License SDK

Monetize any repo. Drop-in license gate with seat management, usage quotas, and audit trail.

See it in action

One command. Infinite leverage.

mekong-cli 
$ mekong cook "Launch marketing campaign for SaaS product"
OpenClaw online. Planning mission...

▸ Step 1/5 Analyzing market position
▸ Step 2/5 Generating copy variants (3 angles)
▸ Step 3/5 Creating email sequence (7 emails)
▸ Step 4/5 Scheduling social posts (30 days)
▸ Step 5/5 Publishing landing page

✓ Mission complete — 5 MCU consumed
$ mekong plan "Q1 fundraise — Series A"
Generating pitch deck, financial model, data room...
✓ VC package ready — docs/pitch-deck.pdf

Get started in 30 seconds

  1. 1
    Install the CLI 
    npm install -g @openclaw/mekong-cli
  2. 2
    Initialize your company 
    mekong company/init
  3. 3
    Run your first mission 
    mekong cook "Write homepage copy"
